overall.description: An atmospheric slow walk through a foggy forest wetland during the blue hour, rendered in a game engine. The scene features dense coniferous trees, shallow misty water, and a moody teal color palette with very low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest wetland with standing water

agents.ego_description: moving slowly forward through shallow misty water in a fog-bound forest

entered.detail: dense wall of tall pine trees forming the backdrop
shallow dark water covering the ground with mist hovering above
light-colored rocks or logs partially submerged in the water
narrow visible band of deep blue sky above the tree line

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a foggy wetland forest during the blue hour. Dense coniferous trees form a dark wall in the background while mist hovers over the shallow water in the foreground. Light-colored rocks are visible on the left side, and a narrow band of twilight sky shows through the canopy. The atmosphere is still, empty, and heavily obscured by fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, fog-shrouded wetland forest during the blue hour. It begins by gliding slowly through shallow water where a thick mist hovers, partially obscuring the terrain. As the camera advances, light-colored rocks emerge on the left while dense coniferous trees form a dark, imposing wall in the background. The scene then shifts toward the canopy, revealing a narrow band of twilight sky that pierces through the heavy fog before the view settles into the still, empty atmosphere of the obscured wilderness.
